live_apps.name: Color Detection
live_apps.desc: Real-time HSV color detection using OpenCV — point your webcam at any object and watch it detect colors live.

live_apps.name: ThingSpeak Sender
live_apps.desc: Push live sensor readings from NodeMCU to ThingSpeak with retry logic, data buffering, and real-time graph.

upcoming.name: AI Plant Disease Detector
upcoming.desc: Upload a photo of your crop — AI identifies the disease and suggests treatment in seconds.

upcoming.name: Smart Irrigation App
upcoming.desc: Mobile-friendly dashboard to monitor and control your irrigation system remotely via ESP32.

upcoming.name: Robotic Arm Simulator
upcoming.desc: Browser-based 3D simulator to program robotic arm movements before deploying to real hardware.

news.title: Embedded Systems 101 — New Module Added
news.body: We've added a full module on interrupt-driven programming with real hardware examples and wiring guides.

news.title: ESP32 Modules Restocked
news.body: Limited stock of ESP32-WROOM and ESP32-CAM modules now available. Order fast!

news.title: Free PCB Review Service Launched
news.body: Send your Gerber files to minibotix@gmail.com — reviewed free within 48 hours.
